title: fix: update OpenClaw setup script for v2026.3
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Sharpening the claws
gist.blurb: The OpenClaw setup script got a much-needed tune-up for v2026.3. We traded 30 lines of messy JSON merging for a clean CLI command, because life is too short to write jq scripts.
gist.summary: Updated the OpenClaw setup script to use the native CLI onboarding and correct configuration schemas for v2026.3.
gist.impact: Setting up OpenClaw with Pollinations is now faster, cleaner, and less prone to configuration errors.
gist.visual_concept: OpenClaw suggests a crab mascot or claw motif. The PR is about fixing a setup script and cleaning up code. Polly the bee helping a cute pixel crab configure a retro terminal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny tool belt, happily helping a cute little red pixel crab type on a glowing retro terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
